# Task Lists

- [x] Completed task
- [ ] Incomplete task
- [ ] Another incomplete task
- [x] Another completed task

## Nested task list

- [x] Top-level done
  - [ ] Sub-task pending
  - [x] Sub-task done
- [ ] Top-level pending
  - [ ] Sub-task pending

Regular list after tasks:

- Normal item
- Another normal item
